overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Elden Ring) showing a cloaked character wading through a flooded cave system, transitioning from dark narrow passages through a tunnel into a vast cavern with towering pillars and dramatic light beams, and finally emerging into an open outdoor area with large rock formations and scattered trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded narrow cave corridor with rocky walls

agents.ego_description: wading slowly through waist-deep water in a dark cave, holding a lantern that illuminates the immediate surroundings

entered.detail: rough gray stone walls of the cave corridor
dark water reaching the character's waist with ripples
rocky outcrop along the left wall with small items on it
small stationary light source mounted on the left wall
large rock formation rising from the water ahead in the passage

segments.scene_description: The character wades through a narrow flooded cave corridor with rough stone walls. A small lantern on the left wall provides dim illumination as the character approaches a large rock formation rising from the water ahead.

events.description: passing through the stone archway into a darker tunnel section
game UI text appears briefly at bottom of screen indicating a site of grace

agents.ego_description: passing the central rock formation and entering the dark tunnel archway ahead

entered.detail: dark stone archway tunnel leading deeper into the cave system

segments.scene_description: The character passes the large central rock and enters a narrow tunnel archway. The surroundings become darker as the character moves through the confined stone passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: vast underground cavern with towering pillars and light beams

events.description: emerging from dark tunnel into a brightly lit cavern with light streaming from above
approaching the cave exit with trees becoming visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: moving through the massive cavern toward the distant light, passing between towering stone pillars

entered.detail: massive vertical stone pillars rising to the cavern ceiling
bright beams of light streaming down from openings above
tangled dead roots and branches along the left shoreline
tall pine trees visible through the cave exit ahead

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a vast cathedral-like cavern with massive stone pillars and dramatic beams of light streaming from above. Dead tree roots line the path as the character approaches a distant exit where pine trees are visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront area with floating rock formations

events.description: exiting the cave system into the open outdoor area with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: emerging from the cave into a wide open area, continuing to wade through shallow water toward massive rock formations

entered.detail: bright blue sky visible overhead with light mist
massive floating rock formations suspended in the air

segments.scene_description: The character exits the cave into a vast open waterfront area under a bright blue sky. Massive floating rock formations tower in the distance while a pine tree stands on the left shore. The water becomes shallower as the character approaches the center of the open area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a flooded cave into a vast, sunlit open landscape. It begins with a character wading through a narrow, dim corridor of rough stone, passing a small wall lantern and a central rock formation. As the character moves through a confining stone tunnel archway, the surroundings momentarily darken before the scene suddenly expands into a cathedral-like cavern defined by massive pillars and dramatic beams of light. The camera then follows the character past dead tree roots toward a distant opening, finally emerging from the cave into a bright waterfront area under a clear blue sky. The environment opens completely to reveal towering floating rock formations and scattered pine trees as the character moves through increasingly shallow water.
